arts.ttl: Liverpool v Southampton: FPL team news + predicted line-ups
arts.sum: Team form, absentees and our predicted XIs The post Liverpool v Southampton: FPL team news + predicted line-ups appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Liverpool on verge of 90-year-old scoring record but Slot wants more
arts.sum: Manager says team can be more prolific despite 1935 Sunderland scoring streak being under threat on Saturday Luis Enrique described Liverpool’s front three as “fighter jets” before their visit to Paris Saint‑Germain on Wednesday. He may have succeeded in grounding them but Arne Slot’s side still found a way to soar. The exhilarating, aggressive football of Jürgen Klopp has given way to quality control under his successor, but Liverpool are no less effective for that shift. The league leaders, who can go 16 points clear with victory over Southampton on Saturday, have scored more goals after 28 games of this Premier League campaign (66) than at the same stage of their last title-winning season, under Klopp in 2019-20 (64). Plymouth, Tottenham (in a Carabao Cup semi-final Spurs ultimately lost 4-1 on aggregate) and Nottingham Forest are the only teams to prevent Slot’s team scoring in 44 matches this season. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta fires warning to Arsenal stars in bid to avoid following Liverpool example
arts.sum: Arsenal smashed seven goals past PSV Eindhoven in the Champions League in midweek having failed to score in their previous two matches, and now meet Manchester United on Sunday

arts.ttl: Arne Slot ramps up title mind games with cunning reminder to Liverpool stars
arts.sum: Liverpool are 13 points ahead of Arsenal going into Saturday's clash with Southampton at Anfield and Arne Slot has delivered some telling hometruths to his players

arts.ttl: Arne Slot states where Darwin Nunez is for Liverpool after public criticism
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot criticised Darwin Nunez's work rate before he weighed in with a vital assist for the Reds against Paris Saint-Germain in the Champions League

arts.ttl: Arne Slot insists Liverpool's clash with Southampton is their 'most important' in upcoming week of 'three finals' - with PSG and Newcastles ties looming
arts.sum: DOMINIC KING: Arne Slot has warned Liverpool 's players they face a week of three finals - and that Saturday's Anfield clash with Southampton is the most important of all.

arts.ttl: Liverpool Transfer News: Arne Slot warned over Alexander Isak red flags
arts.sum: The Swede would cost in excess of €100 million in the summer and this hefty price tag, in combination with his injury issues, should make Liverpool think twice about pursuing Isak, argues Anfield Watch expert Sam McGuire . Liverpool can't afford to overlook Alexander Isak's obvious red flags, according to Anfield Watch correspondent Sam McGuire.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Joshua Kimmich has made decision over his future as Arsenal, Man City and Liverpool contacted by his camp
arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively confirm that Arsenal, Manchester City and Liverpool have been contacted by Joshua Kimmich’s camp regarding the decision he has made over...

arts.ttl: Jurgen Klopp reveals his Liverpool return date but legendary former boss admits fears he could 'jinx' the Reds Premier League title win
arts.sum: Klopp has not been back to Merseyside since quitting the club at the end of last season. Klopp's absence has allowed his successor Arne Slot to enjoy a fine debut season without distraction.

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Reds hold 'genuine interest' in prolific Bundesliga forward
arts.sum: Liverpool reportedly have a 'genuine interest' in signing a Bundesliga forward who is attracting significant attention from other Premier League clubs.
